title: cordylanthus pilosus var. tenuis
intro: Cordylanthus pilosus var. tenuis, also known as a coastal or narrow-leaved bird's beak, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Cordylanthus pilosus var. tenuis include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
